name: 01-open-a4-booklet
description: Opening a uniform-A4 multi-page PDF must (a) auto-select continuous viewMode, (b) settle on a sane scale (not the 0.0012 race), (c) pick the Raster (PDFium) render engine. Page number + annotation count are NOT asserted here because they reflect user-session state from prior scenarios, not load behaviour.

assertions.label: A4 booklet opens in continuous mode
scale settled in sane range (no 0.0012 race)
